problem_statement: Busy households drop weekly planning tasks and meal notes when schedules change.
target_market: Adults managing work and home routines with recurring planning tasks.
offered_solution: A guided planning app that turns loose notes into a weekly routine checklist.
validation_goal: Test whether a simple subscription product feels useful enough to try for weekly planning.
pricing_hypothesis: $12 monthly subscription with a free trial.
landing_page_text: Keep weekly tasks visible without building your own spreadsheet workflow.
mvp_scope: Capture weekly tasks and suggest a simple home planning routine.
concierge_mvp_idea: Founder reviews task lists and returns a suggested weekly checklist.
assumptions: Users want a lighter planning routine.
A small subscription feels acceptable if the routine sticks.
constraints: Must feel lighter than a full productivity system.
known_risks: Consumers may already have too many subscriptions.
